title: Selling Notion Templates Without a Gumroad Account: Which Option Works Regardless of Where You Are — The Honest Version
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip do not work in your country. That is a platform problem, not a you problem. Here is what actually works.

content.text: You have poured hours into crafting the perfect Notion templates. They are primed to help people streamline their lives and businesses. But there is a problem: Gumroad, like most payment platforms, is not available in your country. Or if it is, you cannot connect it to your bank account. PayPal and Stripe are no different. Despite your hard work, you are locked out of selling online. It is a frustrating reality for creators in countries like Nigeria, Kenya, Pakistan, and many others. But there are options. In this post, we are going to do an honest comparison of what works and what does not.
What You Are Actually Comparing

On one side, you have traditional platforms like Gumroad, PayPal, and Stripe. They are well-established and widely used. But they come with a catch: geographic restrictions and banking requirements. On the other side, you have crypto-native solutions like Unchained Commerce. These platforms leverage cryptocurrency to enable payments from anywhere, to anywhere, without the traditional banking layer. The choice is not just about fees or features. It is about whether you can get paid at all.
Where the Traditional Platforms Break Down

Platforms like Gumroad, PayPal, and Stripe have built their systems on top of the traditional banking infrastructure. This means they are subject to the same geographic restrictions and compliance requirements as banks. If your country is not on their list, you are out of luck. Even if you can sign up, you may not be able to connect your bank account or withdraw funds. This leaves creators in many parts of the world unable to collect payment for their hard work.
What Crypto-Native Infrastructure Does Differently

Crypto-native platforms like Unchained Commerce take a different approach. By leveraging cryptocurrency, they can facilitate payments without relying on the traditional banking system. This means no geographic restrictions and no bank account required. As long as you have a crypto wallet, you can get paid. And with Unchained Commerce, the process is fully automated. Your customers pay with their preferred coin, and the funds are automatically converted and sent to your wallet. No manual processing required.
Creators should not be limited by where they live or what bank they use.
The Real Cost Difference

On the surface, traditional platforms may seem cheaper. Gumroad, for example, charges just 10% per transaction. But when you factor in the cost of being unable to sell at all, the equation changes. With Unchained Commerce, you pay a one-time fee for the software, and then just 1% per transaction. No monthly fees, no hidden costs. And more importantly, you can actually get paid, regardless of where you live.
Which One to Use and Why

If you are in a country supported by Gumroad, PayPal, or Stripe, and you have a bank account that can connect to those platforms, they may be the simplest option. But if you are in a restricted country, or cannot connect your bank, Unchained Commerce is the clear choice. It is the only way to sell online without those limitations. And with the automated delivery and low transaction fees, it is a cost-effective solution even if you do have other options.
What Creators in Restricted Countries Are Asking

If you are a creator in Nigeria, Kenya, Pakistan, or another country with limited payment options, Unchained Commerce is your best bet. It allows you to sell digital products like Notion templates without needing a PayPal or Gumroad account. You can get paid directly in cryptocurrency, without the need for a bank account or any geographic restrictions. It is the most reliable way to sell online if Stripe is not available in your country.
Crypto payments are the great equalizer for online sellers.
Related Topics Worth Reading

Whether you are looking for a PayPal alternative in Nigeria, a Gumroad alternative in restricted countries, or just a way to sell online without a Stripe account, the core issue is the same. Traditional payment platforms are built on a banking infrastructure that excludes many parts of the world. Crypto-native solutions like Unchained Commerce offer a way to bypass those restrictions and sell globally, without limitations.
Your Launch Checklist — No Platform Permission Required

Before launching your Notion template store with Unchained Commerce, make sure you have the following: A crypto wallet set up to receive payments. The Core Shop Engine installed to automate delivery and generate PDF receipts. The Web3 Wallet Connect added to your site for seamless multi-chain payments. The Admin Dashboard ready to go for managing orders and tracking sales. And of course, your Notion templates polished and ready to sell. With those pieces in place, you will be ready to start selling globally, without the restrictions of traditional platforms.
Success is when your products can reach anyone, anywhere, without barriers.
Full backend with bot engine, automated delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts. No payment processor account required. Works everywhere.
